name: @vtstech/pi-tgz-installer
description_en: Pi extension that does one thing and does it well. Installs pi-packages from .tgz archives. Adds /tgz-install command for installing Pi packages from .tgz URLs or local files
description_zh: 做好一件事的 pi 扩展。从 .tgz 存档安装 pi 包。添加 /tgz-install 命令用于从 .tgz URL 或本地文件安装 Pi 包。
